crash-malformed-function-call: CRASH ROOT CAUSE: OpenRouter returns finish_reason='MALFORMED_FUNCTION_CALL' when models hallucinate syntax, breaking Pydantic-AI's strict OpenAI schema. SOLUTION: Catch UnexpectedModelBehavior in _loopguard.py's run_with_loopguard loop, append a UserPromptPart warning, and continue to force a retry instead of HALTing.
discipline-fail-fast-loudly-cheaply: CODING DISCIPLINE (Francis, absolute): Fail Fast (ship smallest MVP, no future-proofing), Fail Loudly (full tracebacks, NO silent except:pass / no hidden swallow), Fail Cheaply (cheap assertions before expensive LLM calls). NO FALLBACK SHIT EVER - single model per role, raw crash on malformed output is correct, never re-add fallback chains.
discipline-pydantic-only: STRICT PYDANTIC ONLY (Option B2): All domain lookups/tables = Pydantic registry models with typed fields. Enums ONLY as field types inside a Pydantic model, never standalone container. Pydantic is all we need.
discipline-zero-dicts: ZERO-DICTS (absolute rule): No dict access on Pydantic models or domain lookups. ALL dicts -> strict Pydantic models/Enums/Literals. Only allowed dict = one .model_dump() at wire/ingress+egress seam.
harness-fail-loudly-resume: HARNESS: Fail Loudly + RESUMABLE at EVERY step (per-phase + per-task). state.json atomic (os.replace); reset_stale_in_progress on restart. Loop guard = RECOVER-not-EXIT (Agent(tools=[]) forces answer, provider-robust for deepseek_flash which lacks tool_choice). NO silent swallow.
harness-planner-owns-execution: HARNESS: Planner = PM, OWNS dependency mgmt + parallelisable_workplan DAG (file-disjoint groups). Runner FAITHFULLY executes + ASSERTS planner claims, HALTING loudly on violation. Runner must NEVER mutate DAG at runtime. Coder budget=75, max 5 files/coder.
harness-tier-a-permanent: HARNESS (PERMANENT): runner.py (factory/infra/runner.py) IS the orchestrator - deterministic conductor, NO LLM orchestrator. B2 LLM-orchestrator rewrite ABANDONED/DEFERRED. global_alignment plan-sourced.
harness:line-number-guardrail-defect: DEFECT (analysis 2026-07-21): planner task instructions cite real source line numbers but runner injected raw file text without line-number prefixes. Fix: prefix injected content with line numbers; keep edits content/symbol-based; re-derive at exec time.
orchestrator-coderN-prompt-trace-2026-07: READ-ONLY trace of per-coderN prompt creation+storage. TWO LAYERS: (1) SYSTEM PROMPT (shared, frozen) = pydantic_ai_default_block + CODING_PHILOSOPHY + customised/coder.yaml spec.instructions. (2) PER-TASK BRIEF (coderN-specific) = built INLINE in runner.execute_task.
orchestrator-planner-is-PM-owns-executio: Planner = PM. It OWNS dependency management, task grouping, and the execution model (sequential vs concurrent vs worktree). The runner must NOT hardcode a parallelism mechanism.
orchestrator-workplan-is-DAG: parallelisable_workplan = list[WorkGroup] with depends_on edges. MECE workstreams = groups with empty depends_on; dependent workstreams = depends_on pointing at predecessors. Runner topologically sorts + executes.
factory-historical-evolution: HISTORICAL DEVELOPMENT: AI-Factory was originally built inside baziforecaster as admin/orchestrator (v0.1.0 to v0.3.0). In July 2026, it was decoupled into a standalone community open-source project under MIT License. All historical decisions (Fail Loudly, Zero-Dicts, LoopGuard, DAG Planner) originate from this codebase lineage.
